name: wise-claude
description: Home of the wise plugin — a Claude Code copilot with flat /wise-* slash commands, a workflow engine, and autonomous git / PR / ticket-planning pipelines.

plugins.name: wise
plugins.description: A Claude Code copilot — flat slash commands, a workflow engine, and shared scripts for everyday git / PR / ticket-planning / skill-authoring tasks. The /wise command is a natural-language helper that classifies requests against the catalog of registered /wise-* commands.
